audit_items.proof_trace: peci_bus_device_remove contains zero free/kfree/put_device calls, so the property's universal quantifier ('forall free(p) in peci_bus_device_remove') has an empty domain and is vacuously satisfied. Every pointer used (dev, device, driver) is guaranteed valid by the Linux bus framework: dev holds an active reference during the .remove callback, and dev->driver is only cleared after the callback returns by __device_release_driver.
